name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Renovation At Gada Electronics
desc: Taarak steps in and saves Jethalal from getting embarrassed in front of Babita. Jethalal, worried that his business is affected by the renovation, seeks Taarak's help again.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah ‚Äì Jethalal - The Cricketer
desc: Goli distributes kachoris to everyone in Gokuldham Society. Jethalal talks to Bapuji about his shop's interior work. Meanwhile, the kids are playing cricket downstairs and Jethalal flaunts his cricket skills in front of Babita.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Kachori Delivery
desc: Goli tries to deliver his mother's handmade kachori to Iyer's house, but faces multiple hurdles along the way.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah ‚Äì Ahmedabad Se Surprise
desc: Sundar arrives at Jethalal's house and tells him that he has brought a surprise from Ahmedabad. When Goli tells his father about the kachori, he wishes that he could have some as well.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Tapu Sena On High Alert
desc: The shopping fiesta begins at the Gokuldham Society. Tapu Sena catches a pickpocket, who tries to run away with a lot of valuable items.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Permission Granted
desc: Bhide, after consulting everyone, grants the hawkers permission to set up their stalls. Tapu Sena assures Bhide that they will take care of the security arrangements.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Permission For Stalls
desc: The hawkers reach Gokuldham Society to set up their stalls. However, they need permission from Bhide, the society's secretary, before doing anything.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Helping The Needy
desc: The police explain their reasons for raiding the roadside hawkers. Feeling bad about the situation, Mahila Mandal comes up with a solution that helps all the parties.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Diwali Shopping
desc: Taarak writes a poem for the occasion of Diwali and requests Jethalal to hear it. The members of the Gokuldham Society visit the local market for Diwali shopping.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Supporting The Small Shops
desc: Jethalal narrates the incident about Taarak's boss to Bapuji. Madhvi requests the Mahila Mandal to shop from the local market to support the small businesses that had suffered due to COVID-19.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Democracy In The Office
desc: Taarak's boss claims that there is democracy in his office and everyone is free to express their opinions. But how will he react when Taarak tells him that his 'Boss Bashing' poem was intended towards him?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Taarak And Iyer's Meeting
desc: Taarak and Iyer reach the restaurant and wait for their bosses to arrive. Taarak's boss feels that it is his responsibility to counsel his childhood friend to become a better senior.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Sutli Bomb Jaisi Kavita
desc: Jethalal forces Taarak to recite his poem in front of Anjali and Babita. Jethalal helps Iyer to calm down so they can find a solution for their problems.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Iyer Gets Into Trouble
desc: Taarak's boss calls Iyer and tells him that Iyer's boss is his childhood friend. Iyer calls Taarak to tell him about the trouble he has gotten himself into.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Saving Taarak's Job
desc: Jethalal calls Iyer and asks him to help save Taarak's job. Iyer reluctantly agrees to lie to Taarak's boss about the poem.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Rootha Hua Jetha
desc: After getting into more trouble at work, Taarak tries to seek Jethalal's help. However, an angry Jethalal takes his time to forgive Taarak and give him some advice.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Taarak's Poem
desc: Taarak's boss asks him to read out his poem, but Taarak knows that reading his poem out, will get him in trouble.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Taarak Ka Hathiyaar
desc: The boss's wife calls the office to inform them that she has found the birth certificate. Taarak plans to use his best weapon to take his revenge.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Taarak Has 30 Minutes
desc: Babita delivers Jethalal's letter to his home before he leaves for his shop. Taarak's boss gives him 30 minutes to find a birth certificate.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – The Kahwa Party
desc: Bhide gets Bapuji and everyone else's wives to Popatlal's home. They misunderstand the Kahwa to be an alcoholic beverage and begin to revolt against the drinkers.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Popatlal's Fan Mail
desc: Popatlal receives Kashmiri Kahwa from a fan and calls everyone to his home to have some. Bhide, who leaves his phone at home, looks for all his friends everywhere in the Gokuldham Society.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bhide's Midnight Scare
desc: Bhide calls Sodhi and Jethalal for help in the middle of the night as he thinks there is some trouble at the door. Jethalal and Taarak carry any weapon they can get their hands on and rush to Bhide's home.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bhide Ka Bhayanak Sapna
desc: With Abdul missing from his shop, Bhide prepares soda for everyone. Bhide has a terrible nightmare that keeps disturbing his sleep.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bapuji Ka Saath
desc: Bapuji tells Tapu Sena that he will always support them if they always stay on the right path. Bhide and Sodhi visit Ramakant Kama to hand him the money.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Tapu Sena's Confession
desc: Bhide gets enraged by the string of lies Tapu Sena has been telling and blames himself for being a poor teacher. Tapu Sena decides to tell the truth to their parents.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Tapu Sena's Parents Meet
desc: Abdul follows Tapu Sena and updates Bhide of their movement. Tapu Sena's parents gather at Bhide's house and find out about their lies.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Tapu Sena Ki Complaint
desc: Bhide plays along with the lies that Tapu Sena tells him. He decides to call their parents to tell them about their blunders.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Tapu Sena Contacts A Loan Shark
desc: Tapu Sena contacts a loan shark to help Sonu give the cash to her father. The loan shark informs them about his terms and conditions for lending them the money.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Paiso Ka Jugaad
desc: Tapu Sena calls their parents and tries to borrow cash so they can give it to Bhide.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bhide Finds The Cheque
desc: Tapu Sena is in shambles due to the problem they have gotten themselves into. Bhide gets a call from an officer who tells him that he found his cheque lying on the road.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bhide's Money Withdrawn
desc: Tapu Sena returns to Gokuldham Society and lies to Bhide about his money. Bhide receives a message from his bank that money has been withdrawn from his account.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Tapu Sena Loses The Cheque
desc: Bhide hands the cheque to his daughter and asks Tapu Sena to head directly to the bank. After losing the cheque at the market, Tapu Sena frantically searches for it everywhere.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bhide Needs Cash
desc: Bhide needs hard cash that he has to give to Ramakant Kaka. Bhide decides to send Sonu, with Tapu Sena, to the bank to withdraw the money he needs.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Sakharam Is Safe
desc: Sodhi calls Bhide to tell him that he sent a mechanic to repair his scooter. Popatlal and Bapuji give Tapu Sena a small history lesson.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Sakharam Hua Chori
desc: Everyone at the Gokuldham Society gets ready to go to their jobs. Someone suspicious walks into the society who has his eyes set on Bhide's Sakharam.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Sakharam Buddha Ho Gaya
desc: Bhide realises that his scooter has gotten old and needs extra care. He calls Sodhi hoping that he might know a mechanic who can help.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Laut Ke Aayenge
desc: It is finally Popatlal and Jethalal's turn to put on a show. Everyone has tears of joy as they bid farewell to Lord Ganesha.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Tapu Sena's Combined Act
desc: Impressed by the freedom fighters, everyone hopes that their spirit keeps inspiring our future generations. Members of Tapu Sena put up a joint performance for the society members.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Insaan Se Insaan Jude
desc: The spotlight lands on Anjali, Iyer, and Babita next. They put on their costumes and portray stories from India's freedom fighting days.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – The Patriots At Gokuldham
desc: Sodhi, Taarak and Bhide put on their costumes and perform their acts. Everyone enjoys the visual and knowledgeable performances that the participants illustrate.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Ganesh Utsav Competition
desc: Bhide takes the Ganesh Utsav forward at the Gokuldham Society. The members take turns to display their costumes.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Independence Day At Gokuldham
desc: The Gokuldham members are ready to start the Ganpati Utsav. To celebrate the 75th year of independence, everyone dresses up as the freedom fighters of India.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Ranga Rang Karyakram
desc: Sunderlal arrives at Jethalal's house with a deal. Bhide calls everyone to let them know about the programmes that are lined up for the celebration.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bappa's Welcome
desc: The members of Gokuldham Society welcome Lord Ganesh to their care. Bhide reveals the programmes he has planned with Tapu Sena for the celebrations.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bappa Arrives At Gokuldham
desc: Everyone gets ready to welcome Ganpati Bappa at the Gokuldham Society. Bhide gets anxious before Lord Ganesh arrives.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Pandits Create Confusion
desc: Popatlal takes Bhide to a Pandit so they can help Bhide understand his dream. They come back and call everyone to give an update about the situation.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Aftermath Of Bhide's Dream
desc: Bhide is at a loss for words because of his dream. He talks to various members of the Gokuldham Society about his dream and everybody tries to think of a way out.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Ganesha's Message For Bhide
desc: Bhide enumerates the names of Lord Ganesh. Later, he dreams of meeting Lord Ganesh himself, after following Mushak.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Champaklal Comes Up With A Solution
desc: The conflict between Tapu Sena and Bhide continues to ascertain who gets to prepare for the upcoming Ganesh Utsav. On seeing the argument escalate at the society meet, Champaklal intervenes and comes up with a solution that is accepted by all. Who will get to prepare for the upcoming Ganesh Utsav?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – An Excited Bhide
desc: Bhide believes he will beat Tapu Sena and get to organise the upcoming Ganesh Utsav. Everybody waits for Jethalal to reach the clubhouse so that the meeting can begin. Will Jethalal arrive on time?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bhide Prepares For Ganesh Utsav
desc: Bhide speeds up his preparations for Ganesh Utsav and asks Iyer to meet him to decide the budget. Tapu Sena has also started their preparations for Ganesh Utsav, as they do every year. Will Bhide beat Tapu Sena's budget and get to prepare for Ganesh Utsav?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bhide Wants To Plan Ganesh Utsav
desc: Bhide has decided to plan for the Ganesh Utsav this year, instead of Tapu Sena. He tries to come up with a unique idea to celebrate Ganesh Utsav, but cannot think of anything. Who will plan the celebrations for Ganesh Utsav?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Popatlal Returns From Hyderabad
desc: Popatlal returns from Hyderabad. Bhide takes offline classes. His students are extremely happy to be back for offline classes. Meanwhile, Tapu Sena decides to meet to come up with ideas to celebrate Ganesh Chaturthi.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Post Vaccine Effects
desc: Jethalal has a sore arm and Tapu, a fever. Champaklal calls Dr Hathi over. Dr Hathi tactfully rids Jethalal of the sore arm. What will his solution for Tapu be?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Successful Vaccination Drive
desc: The colony members celebrate the successful vaccination drive and find out that the people who had spread rumours have been caught.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Convincing People For Vaccination
desc: As the misunderstanding around the vaccination drive clears out, the colony members decide to go out and convince people to come and get vaccinated.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Colony Members Under Arrest?
desc: Inspector Pandey comes to the colony to arrest the members for running a fake vaccination drive. Are the colony members in trouble?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Vaccination Drive Sabotaged
desc: Tapu Sena finds that someone has taken all their vaccination drive banners down. Bhide calls for the police's help to catch the people spreading misinformation.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Gokuldham Vaccination Rumours
desc: With all the members of the society vaccinated, everyone prepares for outsiders to arrive for the vaccine. They are shocked when no one turns up for getting vaccinated.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jethalal Caught
desc: After his lie gets caught, Jethalal runs away from everyone to save himself from the injection. He seeks Taarak's help to protect himself from the other members of Gokuldham.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Gokuldham Vaccinated
desc: Everyone gathers at the camp and gets vaccinated for COVID-19. Taarak reveals that Jethalal isn't sick and is lying to escape the camp.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jethalal Ka Brahmastra
desc: Everyone gets up early to prepare for the Gokuldham Vaccination Drive. Jethalal comes up with a clever plan to save himself from the needle.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Convincing To Take A Shot
desc: Bhide and Dr. Hathi are excited to make all the arrangements and start with their vaccination drive. Bhide finds out that Sodhi does not want to take the vaccination either.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – The Sena's Vaccination Song
desc: Jethalal and Taarak get into another quarrel as Jethalal has a new excuse for not taking the vaccine. Tapu Sena performs the vaccination song that they have been preparing with Taarak.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Publicity Plans
desc: Bhide informs everyone that Popatlal will publish an article about the vaccination drive. Tapu Sena seeks the help of Ritu for advertising their new song.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Gokuldham Vaccination Drive
desc: Dr Hathi reveals that he will be conducting a vaccination drive and helping everyone in the society to get their shots. Taarak and Jethalal get into a fight when Jethalal declares that he doesn't want to get vaccinated.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jalebi Ka Order
desc: Jethalal asks Taarak to accompany him for a plate of 'Jalebi' and 'Fafda.' Bapuji does not allow Taarak to eat the 'Jalebi' that Tapu orders online.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jalebi Ke Sapne
desc: Bapuji reminisces about his younger days with Tapu. Jethalal asks Baupuji to accompany him for a special breakfast.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Taarak Ke Bahane
desc: Taarak reaches home to discover that his wife is going to her friend's place. He is worried that he will have to lie to everyone who question him.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Taarak Gets Caught
desc: Mr. Mehta's boss finds out that he lied and took a day off from work. He confronts him in the restaurant. Is Mr. Mehta's job in danger?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Magan Saves The Day
desc: Jethalal and the society members celebrate the fact that the electronic stock was saved and nothing was stolen. Mr Mehta gets furious that because of Jethalal's misunderstanding he had to take a day off from work.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Saving Taarak
desc: To get Mr.Mehta a day off from work, Jethalal calls Mr.Mehta's boss and pretends to be Anjali, who has fallen sick all of a sudden.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – The Empty Warehouse
desc: Jethalal gets the shock of his life when he reaches his warehouse and finds that it is empty. He panics and calls Bagha but, he too is of no help. Jethalal decides to call Mr Mehta for help, who is in a tricky situation with his boss for coming late.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Late For Work
desc: Mr Mehta is running late for work, and there seems to be no available mode of travel for him. Jethalal, as usual, is running late, and Bhide is going in the opposite direction. How does Mr Mehta get to work in time?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Missing Glasses
desc: Bapuji's glasses go missing and they are nowhere to be found. Where could his glasses be? Meanwhile, Taarak gets late for office.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – A Healthy Diet
desc: Everyone gets back to their daily routine and life goes back to normal in Gokuldham. Taarak gets to know that Anjali has plans for him and will only give him healthy food to eat.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Remembering Dilip Kumar
desc: The colony members get nostalgic and remember one of the icons of Indian cinema, Dilip Kumar. They cherish his memories by singing his songs.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Right To Party
desc: The men of the society sit around and remember the trip. They talk about the party incident and come to a conclusion that it is their right to party occasionally.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Remembering The Trip
desc: Anjali makes delicious dinner for Taarak as all the colony members meet at Mehta's residence and re-live their resort memories.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Leaving The Resort
desc: Jethalal arrives late at the lobby for his check out. The owner of the resort sends a present to everyone for helping the resort.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Check Out From Resort
desc: Everyone goes back to their rooms to rest after the boat race. The next morning, the Gokuldham members start checking out from the resort.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Gokuldham Boat Race
desc: Everyone relaxes in the swimming pool area of the resort. Later, everyone gathers at the lake and divide into teams to compete in a boat race.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Joshile Vs Mastane
desc: Everyone is happy that they broke out of their regular lockdown routine to visit the resort. Jethalal and Taarak get into separate teams and play a game in the swimming pool.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bapuji Makes Everyone Dance
desc: Bapuji punishes all the men of the Gokuldham Society for lying about the bottle. All the men later apologise for their plan to party.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bapuji Finds The Bottle
desc: Bapuji has a severe case of hiccups and decides to consume some 'kadha.' How will he react when he finds out the original contents of the bottle.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bagha Ke Liye Goli
desc: Bapuji catches Bagha and scolds him for his behaviour. The resort's manager gets medicine to help Bagha come back to his senses.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Catching Bagha
desc: Everyone tries different strategies to get Bagha to calm down and go back to his room. Bapuji finds out that Bagha is missing and gets furious.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bagha Loses Control
desc: Bagha gets drunk and wants to keep dancing. Everyone tries to stop him and take him to his room.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Party Sharty Start
desc: Everyone gathers at the hall to enjoy a lavish dinner at the resort.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Gokuldham Dinner
desc: Tapu Sena enjoys a game of pool in the play area. Everyone decides to meet up for a Gokuldham style dinner at the resort.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Party Sharty Ka Jugaad
desc: All gents of the Gokuldham Society meet to discuss the party. They ask Popatlal to use his contacts for managing the party.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Kala Kauwa Trophy
desc: Jethalal continues to narrate every detail about their mission to everyone. Gokuldham members show their appreciation for Popatlal's efforts by giving him a trophy.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Narrating The Mission
desc: Dr Hathi, Jethalal and Popatlal narrate the details of Mission Kala Kauwa to all Gokuldham members.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Sammaan Samaroh
desc: All members of the Gokuldham Society gather at the hall. Bhide reveals to Jethalal and Popatlal the reason for their gathering.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Taarak Books A Hall
desc: Taarak Mehta meets the manager of the resort to book a hall. Later, everyone gathers at the hall for a Gokuldham style function.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Kadha For Everyone
desc: Jethalal comes back from his meeting with KK. He tries to give Taarak Mehta a bottle of concoction.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Roaming The Resort
desc: Gokuldham members find a mango tree from which they pluck a few mangoes. They later discover the swimming pool area and are amazed by the ambiance.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Walk Around The Resort
desc: The gents of Gokuldham seek the manager's help in looking for Sodhi's missing bag. Everyone decides to take a walk around the resort together.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Party Bag Goes Missing
desc: Jethalal finally gets to meet K.K. but faces issues in communication as he wants to converse in English. Sodhi and Iyer panic as they can't find the bag with party goods in it.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Gokuldham Waalo Ka Swaagat
desc: Gokuldham members reach the resort reception and start checking themselves in. Popatlal plans to welcome them in a better way.
